COMMUNITY.analyst_flag: FALSE POSITIVE — new LLC entities are 'AMERICAN COMMUNITY BANK' and 'AMERICAN COMMUNITY BANK ISAOA' (ISAOA = mortgage assignment standard suffix). This is a bank acquiring via foreclosure/note sale, not a speculative operator. Recommend adding 'COMMUNITY' to _BANK_ROOTS when first token is 'AMERICAN'.

diff.new_entrants_note: Prior baseline captured only the top-20 operators. Operators labelled 'previously_below_top20_baseline' existed in the 18-month window before this run but were not surfaced because the baseline was capped. 'truly_new_this_week' operators had their first recorded acquisition within the last 7 days.
